title: Numerical Study of Alfven Wave-Energetic Particle Interaction in the Inner Van Allen Belt and predictions of Seismic-Related Energetic Proton Bursts for the IITMSAT Mission
summary:
arXiv:2606.18269v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: The IIT Madras nano-satellite aims to investigate the science of energetic particle precipitation from the inner Van Allen radiation belt into the upper ionosphere as a potential precursor to earthquakes. Precursors in the form of low frequency electromagnetic waves can appear several hours before an earthquake. These waves, captured near the ionosphere magnetosphere transition region, propagate along geomagnetic field lines as Alfven waves and interact resonantly with trapped energetic particles in the radiation belt, causing their precipitatio
